<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="th">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1">
<title>ระบบยืม-คืน อุปกรณ์วิทยาศาสตร์ | ห้องปฏิบัติการทางสัตวศาสตร์</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+Thai:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --green-900:#0f3d27; --green-800:#146239; --green-700:#1a7a45; --green-600:#1f8f50; --green-100:#e5f6ec;
    --blue-600:#2563eb; --blue-100:#e6efff;
    --amber-600:#d97706; --amber-100:#fff2e0;
    --red-600:#dc2626; --red-100:#fde9e9;
    --purple-600:#7c3aed; --purple-100:#f0e9fd;
    --pink-600:#db2777; --pink-100:#fde8f2;
    --indigo-600:#4f46e5; --indigo-100:#e8eaff;
    --gray-600:#64748b; --gray-100:#eef1f5;
    --ink:#182231; --muted:#64748b; --line:#e5e9ef; --bg:#f3f5f8; --card:#ffffff;
    --radius:14px;
    --shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,42,30,.05), 0 10px 26px rgba(15,42,30,.06);
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html,body{margin:0;padding:0;}
  body{font-family:'Noto Sans Thai','Inter',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;}
  a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit;} button{font-family:inherit;}
  ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:8px;height:8px;} ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#cbd5e1;border-radius:8px;}

  .conn-banner{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;justify-content:center;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;padding:6px 10px;text-align:center;}
  .conn-banner.ok{background:var(--green-100);color:var(--green-800);}
  .conn-banner.demo{background:var(--amber-100);color:var(--amber-600);}
  .conn-banner svg{width:14px;height:14px;flex-shrink:0;}

  .app{display:flex;min-height:100vh;}

  /* ===== Sidebar ===== */
  .sidebar{
    width:270px;flex-shrink:0;background:#fff;border-right:1px solid var(--line);
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:sticky;top:0;height:100vh;overflow-y:auto;
  }
  .sb-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:20px 20px 16px;}
  .sb-logo{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden;background:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:1px solid var(--line);box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.08);}
  .sb-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
  .sb-brand h1{font-size:15px;margin:0;color:var(--green-800);font-weight:800;line-height:1.35;}
  .sb-brand p{font-size:11px;margin:2px 0 0;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;}

  .sb-nav{flex:1;padding:6px 12px;}
  .sb-nav button{
    position:relative;
    width:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;
    background:transparent;border:none;color:#3c4658;
    font-size:14px;font-weight:600;padding:11px 14px;border-radius:10px;
    cursor:pointer;text-align:right;margin-bottom:3px;transition:background .15s,color .15s;
  }
  .sb-nav button svg{width:19px;height:19px;flex-shrink:0;}
  .sb-nav button:hover{background:var(--green-100);color:var(--green-800);}
  .sb-nav button.active{background:var(--green-700);color:#fff;}
  .sb-nav .sb-divider{height:1px;background:var(--line);margin:10px 6px;}
  .nav-badge{position:absolute;top:6px;right:8px;background:var(--red-600);color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:800;min-width:17px;height:17px;border-radius:9px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0 4px;}

  .sb-illust{
    margin:auto 14px 0;padding:18px 16px 16px;border-radius:16px;
    background:linear-gradient(160deg,#eafaf0,#d8f3e2);
    position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  }
  .sb-illust .emoji-row{font-size:30px;line-height:1;margin-bottom:8px;letter-spacing:6px;}
  .sb-illust h3{margin:0 0 4px;font-size:13px;color:var(--green-900);font-weight:800;}
  .sb-illust p{margin:0;font-size:10.5px;color:#3f6a52;line-height:1.6;}

  /* ===== Main ===== */
  .main{flex:1;min-width:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
  .topbar{
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
    padding:16px 28px;background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);gap:16px;
  }
  .topbar-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;}
  .hamburger{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--green-700);border:none;color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;}
  .hamburger svg{width:20px;height:20px;}
  .topbar-logo{display:none;width:34px;height:34px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);}
  .page-title{font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--ink);margin:0;}
  .topbar-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;}
  .bell-btn{position:relative;width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;background:#f1f5f9;border:none;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;color:#475569;flex-shrink:0;}
  .bell-btn svg{width:20px;height:20px;}
  .bell-badge{position:absolute;top:4px;right:5px;width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--red-600);color:#fff;font-size:9.5px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
  .user-chip{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;cursor:default;}
  .user-chip .avatar{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green-600);color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;flex-shrink:0;}
  .user-chip .u-name{font-size:13.5px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.3;}
  .user-chip .u-role{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.3;}

  .content{padding:24px 28px 48px;flex:1;}
  .view{display:none;} .view.active{display:block;}
  .greeting{font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);margin:2px 0 22px;}
  .greeting b{color:var(--ink);}

  /* ===== Stat cards ===== */
  .stat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:18px;margin-bottom:22px;}
  .stat-card{background:var(--card);border-radius:var(--radius);box-shadow:var(--shadow);border:1px solid var(--line);padding:18px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;position:relative;}
  .stat-icon{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;}
  .stat-icon svg{width:26px;height:26px;}
  .stat-icon.green{background:var(--green-100);color:var(--green-700);}
  .stat-icon.blue{background:var(--blue-100);color:var(--blue-600);}
  .stat-icon.amber{background:var(--amber-100);color:var(--amber-600);}
  .stat-icon.red{background:var(--red-100);color:var(--red-600);}
  .stat-icon.purple{background:var(--purple-100);color:var(--purple-600);}
  .stat-label{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}
  .stat-value{font-size:24px;font-weight:800;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.2;}
  .stat-value span{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);}
  .stat-sub{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:1px;}
  .stat-dot{position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--red-600);}

  /* ===== Layout grid for dashboard ===== */
  .dash-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.7fr 1fr;gap:20px;align-items:start;}
  @media (max-width:1080px){.dash-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}

  .card{background:var(--card);border-radius:var(--radius);box-shadow:var(--shadow);border:1px solid var(--line);}
  .card-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .card-head h3{font-size:15.5px;font-weight:700;margin:0;color:var(--ink);}
  .card-body{padding:16px 20px 20px;}
  .link-btn{background:#f1f5f9;border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--ink);padding:7px 14px;border-radius:8px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;}
  .link-btn:hover{background:#e6ebf2;}

  table.data-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px;}
  table.data-table th{text-align:right;color:var(--muted);font-weight:700;font-size:12px;padding:9px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);white-space:nowrap;}
  table.data-table td{padding:11px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);vertical-align:middle;}
  table.data-table tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;}
  .who-cell{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;}
  .who-avatar{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green-100);color:var(--green-700);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-size:12.5px;flex-shrink:0;}
  .who-name{font-weight:600;font-size:13px;}
  .who-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}

  .badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:999px;font-size:11.5px;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;}
  .badge.due-soon{background:var(--amber-100);color:var(--amber-600);}
  .badge.overdue{background:var(--red-100);color:var(--red-600);}
  .badge.returned{background:var(--green-100);color:var(--green-700);}
  .badge.borrowing{background:var(--blue-100);color:var(--blue-600);}
  .badge.pending{background:var(--purple-100);color:var(--purple-600);}
  .badge.cancelled{background:var(--gray-100);color:var(--gray-600);}

  .btn-plain-center{display:flex;justify-content:center;margin-top:16px;}
  .btn-outline-full{background:#fff;border:1.5px solid var(--green-700);color:var(--green-700);padding:11px 20px;border-radius:10px;font-size:13.5px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
  .btn-outline-full:hover{background:var(--green-100);}

  /* ===== Reminder list ===== */
  .reminder-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;padding:13px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .reminder-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
  .reminder-icon{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--amber-100);color:var(--amber-600);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;}
  .reminder-icon svg{width:18px;height:18px;}
  .reminder-icon.today{background:var(--red-100);color:var(--red-600);}
  .reminder-title{font-weight:700;font-size:13.5px;color:var(--ink);}
  .reminder-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:1px;}

  /* ===== Quick menu ===== */
  .quick-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin-top:18px;}
  .quick-item{
    border-radius:12px;padding:16px 10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;border:none;
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);
    transition:transform .15s;
  }
  .quick-item:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);}
  .quick-item .qi-icon{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
  .quick-item .qi-icon svg{width:22px;height:22px;color:#fff;}
  .qi-green{background:var(--green-100);} .qi-green .qi-icon{background:var(--green-600);}
  .qi-blue{background:var(--blue-100);} .qi-blue .qi-icon{background:var(--blue-600);}
  .qi-amber{background:var(--amber-100);} .qi-amber .qi-icon{background:var(--amber-600);}
  .qi-purple{background:var(--purple-100);} .qi-purple .qi-icon{background:var(--purple-600);}
  .qi-teal{background:#e3f7f5;} .qi-teal .qi-icon{background:#0d9488;}
  .qi-pink{background:var(--pink-100);} .qi-pink .qi-icon{background:var(--pink-600);}
  .qi-indigo{background:var(--indigo-100);} .qi-indigo .qi-icon{background:var(--indigo-600);}

  /* ===== Forms ===== */
  .form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px 16px;}
  @media (max-width:640px){.form-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
  .field{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;}
  .field.full{grid-column:1/-1;}
  label{font-size:13.5px;font-weight:600;color:#334155;}
  label .req{color:var(--red-600);}
  .checkbox-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-weight:600;font-size:13.5px;color:#334155;flex-direction:row;margin-top:26px;}
  .checkbox-row input{width:17px;height:17px;flex-shrink:0;}
  input[type=text],input[type=date],input[type=number],input[type=tel],input[type=password],input[type=file],select,textarea{
    border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:9px;padding:10px 12px;font-size:13.5px;font-family:inherit;color:var(--ink);background:#fff;outline:none;transition:border-color .15s, box-shadow .15s;width:100%;
  }
  input:focus,select:focus{border-color:var(--green-600);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(31,143,80,.15);}
  input.err,select.err{border-color:var(--red-600);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(220,38,38,.1);}
  .err-msg{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--red-600);display:none;}
  .err-msg.show{display:block;}
  .avail-hint{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;}
  .btn-primary{background:var(--green-700);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:9px;padding:13px 20px;font-size:14.5px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;transition:background .15s;}
  .btn-primary:hover{background:var(--green-800);}
  .btn-primary:disabled{opacity:.6;cursor:not-allowed;}
  .btn-secondary{background:#f1f5f9;color:var(--ink);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:9px;padding:13px 20px;font-size:14.5px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;}
  .btn-secondary:hover{background:#e6ebf2;}
  .form-actions{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:18px;flex-wrap:wrap;}

  .search-row{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .search-row input, .search-row select{flex:1;min-width:180px;}

  .equip-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:14px;}
  .equip-card{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;background:#fff;}
  .equip-name{font-weight:700;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:4px;}
  .equip-cat{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:10px;}
  .equip-qty{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12.5px;color:#334155;}
  .equip-bar{height:6px;border-radius:4px;background:#eef1f5;margin-top:8px;overflow:hidden;}
  .equip-bar-fill{height:100%;background:var(--green-600);border-radius:4px;}

  /* ===== Equipment thumbnails ===== */
  .eq-thumb{width:100%;height:110px;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--green-100);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--green-700);font-weight:800;font-size:26px;}
  .eq-thumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}

  /* ===== Item picker (multi-item borrow) ===== */
  .ip-search{margin-bottom:10px;}
  .ip-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(135px,1fr));gap:10px;max-height:360px;overflow-y:auto;padding:10px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;background:#fafbfc;}
  .ip-card{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:10px;background:#fff;text-align:center;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
  .ip-card .eq-thumb{height:64px;font-size:20px;margin-bottom:2px;}
  .ip-card.ip-disabled{opacity:.5;}
  .ip-card-name{font-size:11.5px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.3;min-height:2.5em;}
  .ip-card-avail{font-size:10.5px;color:var(--muted);}
  .ip-add-btn{background:var(--green-700);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:8px;padding:6px 8px;font-size:11.5px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;width:100%;}
  .ip-add-btn:hover{background:var(--green-800);}
  .ip-add-btn:disabled{background:#cbd5e1;cursor:not-allowed;}
  .ip-stepper{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;width:100%;}
  .ip-stepper button{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:#f1f5f9;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;color:var(--ink);flex-shrink:0;}
  .ip-stepper button:disabled{opacity:.4;cursor:not-allowed;}
  .ip-stepper span{min-width:18px;text-align:center;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;}
  .ip-selected{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;}
  .ip-selected-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:var(--green-100);border-radius:9px;padding:9px 12px;gap:10px;}
  .ip-selected-info{display:flex;flex-direction:column;font-size:12.5px;}
  .ip-selected-info span{color:var(--muted);font-size:11.5px;}
  .ip-remove-btn{background:transparent;border:none;color:var(--red-600);font-weight:700;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;padding:6px;}
  .ip-empty{color:var(--muted);font-size:12.5px;margin:0;padding:14px;text-align:center;grid-column:1/-1;}

  .action-btns{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .btn-xs{padding:7px 11px;font-size:11.5px;border-radius:7px;}

  .placeholder{padding:60px 20px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted);}
  .placeholder svg{width:52px;height:52px;color:#c3cad6;margin-bottom:14px;}
  .placeholder h3{color:var(--ink);margin:0 0 8px;}

  .toast{position:fixed;top:20px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-20px);background:#0f9d58;color:#fff;padding:14px 22px;border-radius:10px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.2);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:all .3s ease;z-index:999;max-width:92vw;text-align:right;}
  .toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);}
  .toast svg{width:18px;height:18px;flex-shrink:0;}

  .footer-note{text-align:center;font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);padding:18px 0 4px;}

  /* ===== Modal ===== */
  .modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(15,23,42,.55);display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:300;padding:16px;}
  .modal-overlay.show{display:flex;}
  .modal-box{background:#fff;border-radius:16px;max-width:680px;width:100%;max-height:92vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.35);}
  .modal-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);position:sticky;top:0;background:#fff;border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;z-index:2;}
  .modal-header h3{margin:0;font-size:16px;font-weight:800;}
  .modal-close{background:transparent;border:none;font-size:24px;line-height:1;cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);padding:4px 8px;}
  .modal-body{padding:18px 20px 22px;}

  @media (max-width:900px){
    .sidebar{position:fixed;left:0;top:0;z-index:150;transform:translateX(-100%);transition:transform .2s;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,.15);}
    .sidebar.open{transform:translateX(0);}
    .content{padding:18px 16px 40px;}
    .topbar{padding:14px 16px;}
    .topbar-logo{display:block;}
  }
  @media (max-width:600px){
    .form-actions{flex-direction:column;}
    .form-actions button{width:100%;}
    .search-row{flex-direction:column;}
    .search-row input, .search-row select, .search-row button{width:100%;flex:none;}
    .user-chip .u-role{display:none;}
    .quick-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
    .card-head{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;}
    table.data-table{font-size:12px;}
    .action-btns{width:100%;}
    .action-btns button{flex:1;min-width:70px;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="toast" id="toast"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg><span id="toastText">บันทึกสำเร็จ</span></div>

<div class="conn-banner demo" id="connBanner">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M12 8h.01M11 12h1v5h1"/></svg>
  <span id="connText">กำลังเชื่อมต่อฐานข้อมูล Google Sheet...</span>
</div>

<div class="app">
  <!-- SIDEBAR -->
  <div class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
    <div class="sb-brand">
      <div class="sb-logo">
        <img class="app-logo-img" alt="ตราสัญลักษณ์มหาวิทยาลัยราชภัฏหมู่บ้านจอมบึง">
      </div>
      <div>
        <h1>ระบบยืม-คืน<br>อุปกรณ์วิทยาศาสตร์</h1>
        <p>ห้องปฏิบัติการทางสัตวศาสตร์<br>มหาวิทยาลัยราชภัฏหมู่บ้านจอมบึง</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="sb-nav" id="sbNav">
      <button class="active" data-view="home"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3 11l9-8 9 8M5 10v10h5v-6h4v6h5V10"/></svg>หน้าหลัก</button>
      <button data-view="borrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>ยืมอุปกรณ์ (จองหลายรายการ)</button>
      <button data-view="return"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 14l-4-4 4-4M5 10h9a5 5 0 0 1 0 10h-1"/></svg>คืนอุปกรณ์</button>
      <button data-view="approvals"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 12l2 2 4-4M12 3l7 4v5c0 5-3.5 7.5-7 9-3.5-1.5-7-4-7-9V7l7-4z"/></svg>อนุมัติการจอง<span class="nav-badge" id="approvalsNavBadge" style="display:none;">0</span></button>
      <button data-view="allBorrows"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2"/><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M8 9h8M8 13h8M8 17h5"/></svg>รายการยืมทั้งหมด</button>
      <button data-view="equipment"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="8" height="8" rx="1.5"/><rect x="13" y="3" width="8" height="8" rx="1.5"/><rect x="3" y="13" width="8" height="8" rx="1.5"/><rect x="13" y="13" width="8" height="8" rx="1.5"/></svg>อุปกรณ์ทั้งหมด</button>
      <button data-view="users"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="9" cy="8" r="3"/><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M2 20c0-3.3 3-6 7-6s7 2.7 7 6M17 8a3 3 0 1 1 0-6M22 20c0-2.7-2-4.8-4.5-5.6"/></svg>ผู้ใช้งาน</button>
      <button data-view="reports"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M4 20V10M12 20V4M20 20v-7"/></svg>รายงาน</button>
      <div class="sb-divider"></div>
      <button data-view="dueAlerts"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M18 8a6 6 0 1 0-12 0c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M13.7 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.4 0"/></svg>แจ้งเตือนวันคืน</button>
      <button data-view="settings"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M19.4 13a1.7 1.7 0 0 0 .3 1.9l.1.1a2 2 0 1 1-2.8 2.8l-.1-.1a1.7 1.7 0 0 0-1.9-.3 1.7 1.7 0 0 0-1 1.5V19a2 2 0 1 1-4 0v-.1a1.7 1.7 0 0 0-1-1.6 1.7 1.7 0 0 0-1.9.3l-.1.1a2 2 0 1 1-2.8-2.8l.1-.1a1.7 1.7 0 0 0 .3-1.9 1.7 1.7 0 0 0-1.5-1H4a2 2 0 1 1 0-4h.1a1.7 1.7 0 0 0 1.5-1 1.7 1.7 0 0 0-.3-1.9l-.1-.1a2 2 0 1 1 2.8-2.8l.1.1a1.7 1.7 0 0 0 1.9.3H10a1.7 1.7 0 0 0 1-1.5V4a2 2 0 1 1 4 0v.1a1.7 1.7 0 0 0 1 1.5 1.7 1.7 0 0 0 1.9-.3l.1-.1a2 2 0 1 1 2.8 2.8l-.1.1a1.7 1.7 0 0 0-.3 1.9V10a1.7 1.7 0 0 0 1.5 1H20a2 2 0 1 1 0 4h-.1a1.7 1.7 0 0 0-1.5 1z"/></svg>ตั้งค่า</button>
      <button data-view="logout"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4M16 17l5-5-5-5M21 12H9"/></svg>ออกจากระบบ</button>
    </div>

    <div class="sb-illust">
      <div class="emoji-row">🔬🧪🐄</div>
      <h3>ห้องปฏิบัติการทางสัตวศาสตร์</h3>
      <p>คณะวิทยาศาสตร์และเทคโนโลยี<br>มหาวิทยาลัยราชภัฏหมู่บ้านจอมบึง</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- MAIN -->
  <div class="main">
    <div class="topbar">
      <div class="topbar-left">
        <button class="hamburger" id="hamburgerBtn">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M4 6h16M4 12h16M4 18h16"/></svg>
        </button>
        <img class="app-logo-img topbar-logo" alt="ตราสัญลักษณ์มหาวิทยาลัยราชภัฏหมู่บ้านจอมบึง">
        <h2 class="page-title" id="pageTitle">หน้าหลัก</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="topbar-right">
        <button class="bell-btn" id="bellBtn">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M18 8a6 6 0 1 0-12 0c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M13.7 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.4 0"/></svg>
          <span class="bell-badge" id="bellBadge">0</span>
        </button>
        <div class="user-chip">
          <div class="avatar">ศ</div>
          <div>
            <div class="u-name">ศศิธร สายแก้ว</div>
            <div class="u-role">เจ้าหน้าที่</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="content">

      <!-- HOME -->
      <div class="view active" id="view-home">
        <div class="greeting">ยินดีต้อนรับ, <b>ศศิธร สายแก้ว</b> (เจ้าหน้าที่)</div>

        <div class="stat-grid">
          <div class="stat-card">
            <div class="stat-icon green"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M9 2h6M10 2v5.5L4.5 18a2 2 0 0 0 1.8 2.9h11.4a2 2 0 0 0 1.8-2.9L14 7.5V2"/></svg></div>
            <div><div class="stat-label">อุปกรณ์ทั้งหมด</div><div class="stat-value" id="statTotal">- <span>รายการ</span></div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-card">
            <div class="stat-icon blue"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="5" y="4" width="14" height="17" rx="2"/><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M9 2h6v3H9zM8 11h8M8 15h5"/></svg></div>
            <div><div class="stat-label">กำลังถูกยืม</div><div class="stat-value" id="statBorrowing">- <span>รายการ</span></div><div class="stat-sub" id="statBorrowingPct">คิดเป็น -%</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-card">
            <div class="stat-icon purple"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 12l2 2 4-4M12 3l7 4v5c0 5-3.5 7.5-7 9-3.5-1.5-7-4-7-9V7l7-4z"/></svg></div>
            <div><div class="stat-label">รอการอนุมัติ</div><div class="stat-value" id="statPending">- <span>รายการ</span></div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-card">
            <div class="stat-icon amber"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 7v5l3 3"/></svg></div>
            <div><div class="stat-label">ใกล้ถึงกำหนดคืน</div><div class="stat-value" id="statDueSoon">- <span>รายการ</span></div><div class="stat-sub">ภายใน 3 วัน</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-card">
            <div class="stat-icon red"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M12 8v5M12 16h.01"/></svg></div>
            <div><div class="stat-label">เกินกำหนดคืน</div><div class="stat-value" id="statOverdue">- <span>รายการ</span></div></div>
            <div class="stat-dot" id="overdueDot" style="display:none;"></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dash-grid">
          <div class="card">
            <div class="card-head"><h3>รายการยืมล่าสุด</h3><button class="link-btn" data-view="allBorrows">ดูทั้งหมด</button></div>
            <div class="card-body">
              <div style="overflow-x:auto;">
                <table class="data-table">
                  <thead><tr><th>รหัสการยืม</th><th>ผู้ยืม</th><th>รายการอุปกรณ์</th><th>วันที่ยืม</th><th>กำหนดคืน</th><th>สถานะ</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody id="recentBorrowsBody"></tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
              <div class="btn-plain-center">
                <button class="btn-outline-full" data-view="allBorrows">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="16" height="16"><rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2"/><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M8 9h8M8 13h8M8 17h5"/></svg>
                  ดูรายการยืมทั้งหมด
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:20px;">
              <div class="card-head"><h3>แจ้งเตือนวันคืน</h3><button class="link-btn" data-view="dueAlerts">ดูทั้งหมด</button></div>
              <div class="card-body" id="reminderList"></div>
            </div>

            <div class="card">
              <div class="card-head"><h3>เมนูด่วน</h3></div>
              <div class="card-body">
                <div class="quick-grid">
                  <button class="quick-item qi-green" data-view="borrow"><div class="qi-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg></div>ยืมอุปกรณ์</button>
                  <button class="quick-item qi-blue" data-view="return"><div class="qi-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 14l-4-4 4-4M5 10h9a5 5 0 0 1 0 10h-1"/></svg></div>คืนอุปกรณ์</button>
                  <button class="quick-item qi-indigo" data-view="approvals"><div class="qi-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 12l2 2 4-4M12 3l7 4v5c0 5-3.5 7.5-7 9-3.5-1.5-7-4-7-9V7l7-4z"/></svg></div>อนุมัติการจอง</button>
                  <button class="quick-item qi-amber" data-view="allBorrows"><div class="qi-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2"/><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M8 9h8M8 13h8M8 17h5"/></svg></div>รายการยืม</button>
                  <button class="quick-item qi-purple" data-view="equipment"><div class="qi-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="8" height="8" rx="1.5"/><rect x="13" y="3" width="8" height="8" rx="1.5"/><rect x="3" y="13" width="8" height="8" rx="1.5"/><rect x="13" y="13" width="8" height="8" rx="1.5"/></svg></div>อุปกรณ์ทั้งหมด</button>
                  <button class="quick-item qi-teal" data-view="dueAlerts"><div class="qi-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M18 8a6 6 0 1 0-12 0c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/></svg></div>แจ้งเตือนวันคืน</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- BORROW FORM -->
      <div class="view" id="view-borrow">
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-head"><h3>แบบฟอร์มยืมอุปกรณ์ (จองอุปกรณ์ได้หลายรายการต่อครั้ง)</h3></div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <form id="borrowForm" novalidate>
              <div class="form-grid">
                <div class="field">
                  <label>ชื่อ-นามสกุลผู้ยืม <span class="req">*</span></label>
                  <input type="text" id="b_name" placeholder="กรอกชื่อ-นามสกุล" required>
                  <div class="err-msg">กรุณากรอกชื่อ-นามสกุล</div>
                </div>
                <div class="field">
                  <label>รหัสนักศึกษา/บุคลากร <span class="req">*</span></label>
                  <input type="text" id="b_studentId" placeholder="กรอกรหัส" required>
                  <div class="err-msg">กรุณากรอกรหัสนักศึกษา/บุคลากร</div>
                </div>
                <div class="field">
                  <label>เบอร์โทรศัพท์ <span class="req">*</span></label>
                  <input type="tel" id="b_phone" placeholder="กรอกเบอร์โทรศัพท์" required>
                  <div class="err-msg">กรุณากรอกเบอร์โทรศัพท์ให้ถูกต้อง</div>
                </div>
                <div class="field">
                  <label>วันที่ยืม <span class="req">*</span></label>
                  <input type="date" id="b_borrowDate" required>
                  <div class="err-msg">กรุณาระบุวันที่ยืม</div>
                </div>
                <div class="field">
                  <label>กำหนดคืน <span class="req">*</span></label>
                  <input type="date" id="b_dueDate" required>
                  <div class="err-msg">กำหนดคืนต้องอยู่หลังวันที่ยืม</div>
                </div>
                <div class="field">
                  <label class="checkbox-row"><input type="checkbox" id="b_immediateApprove" checked> อนุมัติทันที (เจ้าหน้าที่ดำเนินการเอง ไม่ต้องรออนุมัติ)</label>
                </div>
                <div class="field full">
                  <label>เลือกอุปกรณ์ที่ต้องการยืม (เลือกได้หลายรายการ) <span class="req">*</span></label>
                  <input type="text" class="ip-search" data-prefix="bform" placeholder="ค้นหาอุปกรณ์ด้วยชื่อหรือหมวดหมู่...">
                  <div class="ip-grid" id="bform_ipGrid"></div>
                  <div class="err-msg" id="bform_ipErr">กรุณาเลือกอุปกรณ์อย่างน้อย 1 รายการ</div>
                </div>
                <div class="field full">
                  <label>รายการที่เลือก</label>
                  <div class="ip-selected" id="bform_ipSelected"><p class="ip-empty">ยังไม่ได้เลือกอุปกรณ์</p></div>
                </div>
                <div class="field full">
                  <label>หมายเหตุ</label>
                  <input type="text" id="b_note" placeholder="เช่น ใช้สำหรับวิชา / โครงการ">
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="form-actions">
                <button type="submit" class="btn-primary" id="borrowSubmitBtn">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="16" height="16"><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
                  บันทึกการยืม
                </button>
                <button type="button" class="btn-secondary" id="borrowResetBtn">ล้างข้อมูล</button>
              </div>
            </form>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- RETURN FORM -->
      <div class="view" id="view-return">
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-head"><h3>คืนอุปกรณ์</h3></div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="search-row">
              <input type="text" id="returnSearchInput" placeholder="ค้นหาด้วยรหัสการยืม, ชื่อผู้ยืม หรือรหัสนักศึกษา">
              <button class="btn-primary" style="flex:none;" id="returnSearchBtn">ค้นหา</button>
            </div>
            <div id="returnBody">
              <div class="placeholder">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 14l-4-4 4-4M5 10h9a5 5 0 0 1 0 10h-1"/></svg>
                <h3>ค้นหารายการที่ต้องการคืน</h3><p>พิมพ์รหัสการยืมหรือชื่อผู้ยืม แล้วกด "ค้นหา"</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- APPROVALS -->
      <div class="view" id="view-approvals">
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-head"><h3>รายการรอการอนุมัติ (จำเป็นต้องเข้าสู่ระบบเจ้าหน้าที่ในเมนู "ตั้งค่า")</h3></div>
          <div class="card-body" id="approvalsBody"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ALL BORROWS -->
      <div class="view" id="view-allBorrows">
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-head"><h3>รายการยืมทั้งหมด</h3></div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="search-row">
              <input type="text" id="allSearchInput" placeholder="ค้นหาด้วยชื่อผู้ยืม, รหัส หรืออุปกรณ์">
              <select id="allStatusFilter">
                <option value="">สถานะทั้งหมด</option>
                <option value="รอการอนุมัติ">รอการอนุมัติ</option>
                <option value="กำลังยืม">กำลังยืม</option>
                <option value="คืนแล้ว">คืนแล้ว</option>
                <option value="ยกเลิก">ยกเลิก</option>
              </select>
              <button class="btn-secondary" id="allFilterBtn" style="flex:none;">กรอง</button>
            </div>
            <div style="overflow-x:auto;"><table class="data-table" id="allBorrowsTable">
              <thead><tr><th>รหัสการยืม</th><th>ผู้ยืม</th><th>รายการอุปกรณ์</th><th>วันที่ยืม</th><th>กำหนดคืน</th><th>วันคืนจริง</th><th>สถานะ</th><th>จัดการ</th></tr></thead>
              <tbody id="allBorrowsBody"></tbody>
            </table></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- EQUIPMENT -->
      <div class="view" id="view-equipment">
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-head"><h3>อุปกรณ์ทั้งหมด</h3></div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="search-row"><input type="text" id="equipSearchInput" placeholder="ค้นหาชื่ออุปกรณ์หรือหมวดหมู่"></div>
            <div class="equip-grid" id="equipGrid"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- USERS -->
      <div class="view" id="view-users">
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-head"><h3>ผู้ใช้งาน (ผู้เคยยืมอุปกรณ์)</h3></div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div style="overflow-x:auto;"><table class="data-table">
              <thead><tr><th>ชื่อ-นามสกุล</th><th>รหัสนักศึกษา/บุคลากร</th><th>เบอร์โทรศัพท์</th><th>จำนวนครั้งที่ยืม</th><th>กำลังยืมอยู่</th></tr></thead>
              <tbody id="usersBody"></tbody>
            </table></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- REPORTS -->
      <div class="view" id="view-reports">
        <div class="stat-grid" id="reportStatGrid"></div>
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-head"><h3>อุปกรณ์ที่ถูกยืมบ่อยที่สุด</h3></div>
          <div class="card-body" id="reportTopEquipment"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- DUE ALERTS -->
      <div class="view" id="view-dueAlerts">
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-head"><h3>แจ้งเตือนวันคืน (ใกล้ถึงกำหนด / เกินกำหนด)</h3></div>
          <div class="card-body" id="dueAlertsFull"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- SETTINGS -->
      <div class="view" id="view-settings">
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-head"><h3>ตั้งค่า / เพิ่มอุปกรณ์ใหม่</h3></div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div id="settingsLoginBox">
              <p style="font-size:13.5px;color:#334155;margin:0 0 12px;">ต้องกรอกรหัสผ่านเจ้าหน้าที่เพื่อจัดการอุปกรณ์ และเพื่ออนุมัติ/แก้ไข/ยกเลิกการจอง</p>
              <div class="search-row">
                <input type="password" id="settingsPasscodeInput" placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่านเจ้าหน้าที่">
                <button class="btn-primary" style="flex:none;" id="settingsLoginBtn">เข้าสู่ระบบ</button>
              </div>
              <p style="font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);margin:8px 0 0;">โหมดสาธิต: รหัสผ่านคือ demo1234</p>
            </div>
            <div id="settingsPanel" style="display:none;">
              <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--green-700);font-weight:700;margin:0 0 14px;">✓ เข้าสู่ระบบเจ้าหน้าที่แล้ว — สามารถอนุมัติ/แก้ไข/ยกเลิกการจอง และเพิ่มอุปกรณ์ได้</p>
              <form id="addEquipForm" novalidate>
                <div class="form-grid">
                  <div class="field"><label>ชื่ออุปกรณ์ <span class="req">*</span></label><input type="text" id="ae_name" required></div>
                  <div class="field"><label>หมวดหมู่ <span class="req">*</span></label><input type="text" id="ae_category" required></div>
                  <div class="field"><label>จำนวนทั้งหมด <span class="req">*</span></label><input type="number" id="ae_qty" min="1" value="1" required></div>
                  <div class="field"><label>ลิงก์รูปภาพอุปกรณ์ (ถ้ามี)</label><input type="text" id="ae_image" placeholder="https://..."></div>
                  <div class="field"><label>หรืออัปโหลดรูปจากเครื่อง</label><input type="file" id="ae_imageFile" accept="image/*"></div>
                  <div class="field"><label>ตัวอย่างรูป</label><div class="eq-thumb" id="ae_imagePreview" style="width:90px;height:90px;"></div></div>
                </div>
                <div class="form-actions"><button type="submit" class="btn-primary">เพิ่มอุปกรณ์</button></div>
              </form>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
    <div class="footer-note" id="footerNote">© 2024 ห้องปฏิบัติการทางสัตวศาสตร์ มหาวิทยาลัยราชภัฏหมู่บ้านจอมบึง | พัฒนาระบบโดย งานวิทยาศาสตร์และห้องปฏิบัติการ · เวอร์ชัน 2.0.0</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EDIT BOOKING MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="editModalOverlay">
  <div class="modal-box">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <h3>แก้ไขรายการจอง</h3>
      <button type="button" class="modal-close" id="editModalCloseBtn">&times;</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <form id="editBookingForm" novalidate>
        <input type="hidden" id="edit_id">
        <div class="form-grid">
          <div class="field">
            <label>ชื่อ-นามสกุลผู้ยืม <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" id="edit_name" required>
            <div class="err-msg">กรุณากรอกชื่อ-นามสกุล</div>
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>รหัสนักศึกษา/บุคลากร <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" id="edit_studentId" required>
            <div class="err-msg">กรุณากรอกรหัสนักศึกษา/บุคลากร</div>
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>เบอร์โทรศัพท์ <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="tel" id="edit_phone" required>
            <div class="err-msg">กรุณากรอกเบอร์โทรศัพท์ให้ถูกต้อง</div>
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>วันที่ยืม <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="date" id="edit_borrowDate" required>
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>กำหนดคืน <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="date" id="edit_dueDate" required>
            <div class="err-msg">กำหนดคืนต้องอยู่หลังวันที่ยืม</div>
          </div>
          <div class="field full">
            <label>เลือกอุปกรณ์ (เลือกได้หลายรายการ) <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" class="ip-search" data-prefix="edit" placeholder="ค้นหาอุปกรณ์...">
            <div class="ip-grid" id="edit_ipGrid"></div>
            <div class="err-msg" id="edit_ipErr">กรุณาเลือกอุปกรณ์อย่างน้อย 1 รายการ</div>
          </div>
          <div class="field full">
            <label>รายการที่เลือก</label>
            <div class="ip-selected" id="edit_ipSelected"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="field full">
            <label>หมายเหตุ</label>
            <input type="text" id="edit_note">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-actions">
          <button type="submit" class="btn-primary" id="editSubmitBtn">บันทึกการแก้ไข</button>
          <button type="button" class="btn-secondary" id="editCancelBtn">ยกเลิก</button>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
/* =========================================================================
   ตั้งค่าการเชื่อมต่อ Google Sheet
   นำ "Web app URL" ที่ได้จากการ Deploy Google Apps Script (ไฟล์ Code.gs)
   มาวางแทนที่ '' ด้านล่างนี้
   ========================================================================= */
const SCRIPT_URL = 'https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbz5nJc4b5Q2H-N_Nom0drGTsejYmggBvQe7dsWNWi0feq6yFkXoCVuGGzA2CxuncM8S/exec';
let DEMO_MODE = !SCRIPT_URL;
const DEMO_ADMIN_PASSCODE = 'demo1234';

/* โลโก้มหาวิทยาลัยราชภัฏหมู่บ้านจอมบึง (ฝังเป็น Base64 เพื่อให้ไฟล์ทำงานได้โดยไม่ต้องพึ่งอินเทอร์เน็ต) */
const LOGO_DATA_URI = 'data:image/png;base64,';

let equipmentList = [];
let borrowsList = [];
let adminPasscode = '';

/* ---------- Item-picker state (multi-item borrow, used by both new-borrow form and edit modal) ---------- */
const pickerStates = { bform:{items:[]}, edit:{items:[]} };
let editOriginalItems = {}; // eqId -> qty, only used while editing an existing booking

const today = new Date();
function fmtDate(d){ return d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; }
function daysBetween(a,b){ return Math.round((new Date(b) - new Date(a)) / 86400000); }
function shortName(n){ return (n||'').trim().split(/\s+/).map(w=>w[0]).slice(0,2).join(''); }
function esc(str){ return String(str==null?'':str).replace(/[&<>"']/g, c=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c])); }
function escAttr(str){ return esc(str); }

/* ---------- Demo data ---------- */
function buildDemoData(){
  equipmentList = [
    {EquipmentID:'EQ-001', Name:'กล้องจุลทรรศน์ (Microscope)', Category:'เครื่องมือวัดและสังเกต', TotalQty:15, AvailableQty:15, ImageURL:''},
    {EquipmentID:'EQ-002', Name:'เครื่องชั่งดิจิตอล (Digital Balance)', Category:'เครื่องมือวัดและสังเกต', TotalQty:10, AvailableQty:10, ImageURL:''},
    {EquipmentID:'EQ-003', Name:'เครื่องวัด pH (pH Meter)', Category:'เครื่องมือวัดและสังเกต', TotalQty:8, AvailableQty:8, ImageURL:''},
    {EquipmentID:'EQ-004', Name:'เครื่องเขย่าสาร (Shaker)', Category:'เครื่องมือทดลอง', TotalQty:6, AvailableQty:6, ImageURL:''},
    {EquipmentID:'EQ-005', Name:'ปิเปต (Pipette)', Category:'เครื่องแก้วและอุปกรณ์เล็ก', TotalQty:40, AvailableQty:40, ImageURL:''},
    {EquipmentID:'EQ-006', Name:'บีกเกอร์ (Beaker)', Category:'เครื่องแก้วและอุปกรณ์เล็ก', TotalQty:60, AvailableQty:60, ImageURL:''},
    {EquipmentID:'EQ-007', Name:'ตู้อบ (Incubator)', Category:'เครื่องมือทดลอง', TotalQty:4, AvailableQty:4, ImageURL:''},
    {EquipmentID:'EQ-008', Name:'เครื่องปั่นเหวี่ยง (Centrifuge)', Category:'เครื่องมือทดลอง', TotalQty:5, AvailableQty:5, ImageURL:''}
  ];
  const d = (offset)=>{ const t=new Date(); t.setDate(t.getDate()+offset); return fmtDate(t); };
  function mkItems(...pairs){
    return pairs.map(([id,qty])=>{ const eq=equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===id); return {EquipmentID:id, EquipmentName:eq?eq.Name:id, Qty:qty}; });
  }
  borrowsList = [
    {BorrowID:'BRU-2024-00019', BorrowerName:'นาย วีรพล ตั้งใจ', StudentID:'641234573', Phone:'0812340007', Items:mkItems(['EQ-001',1],['EQ-005',2]), BorrowDate:d(0), DueDate:d(7), ReturnDate:'', Note:'ใช้ในโครงการวิจัย', Status:'รอการอนุมัติ'},
    {BorrowID:'BRU-2024-00018', BorrowerName:'น.ส. ทนวรรณ ทองดี', StudentID:'641234567', Phone:'0812340001', Items:mkItems(['EQ-001',1]), BorrowDate:d(-7), DueDate:d(2), ReturnDate:'', Note:'', Status:'กำลังยืม'},
    {BorrowID:'BRU-2024-00017', BorrowerName:'นาย ณัฐวุฒิ ใจดี', StudentID:'641234568', Phone:'0812340002', Items:mkItems(['EQ-002',1],['EQ-006',4]), BorrowDate:d(-8), DueDate:d(1), ReturnDate:'', Note:'', Status:'กำลังยืม'},
    {BorrowID:'BRU-2024-00016', BorrowerName:'น.ส. พรชนก แสงใส', StudentID:'641234569', Phone:'0812340003', Items:mkItems(['EQ-003',1]), BorrowDate:d(-9), DueDate:d(0), ReturnDate:'', Note:'', Status:'กำลังยืม'},
    {BorrowID:'BRU-2024-00015', BorrowerName:'นาย ธีรทัต มั่นคง', StudentID:'641234570', Phone:'0812340004', Items:mkItems(['EQ-004',1]), BorrowDate:d(-12), DueDate:d(-5), ReturnDate:d(-5), Note:'', Status:'คืนแล้ว'},
    {BorrowID:'BRU-2024-00014', BorrowerName:'น.ส. อารยา สุขใจ', StudentID:'641234571', Phone:'0812340005', Items:mkItems(['EQ-005',2]), BorrowDate:d(-13), DueDate:d(-6), ReturnDate:d(-6), Note:'', Status:'คืนแล้ว'},
    {BorrowID:'BRU-2024-00013', BorrowerName:'นาย สมชาย ใจเย็น', StudentID:'641234572', Phone:'0812340006', Items:mkItems(['EQ-007',1]), BorrowDate:d(-15), DueDate:d(-3), ReturnDate:'', Note:'', Status:'กำลังยืม'},
    {BorrowID:'BRU-2024-00012', BorrowerName:'น.ส. กมลชนก ดวงใจ', StudentID:'641234574', Phone:'0812340008', Items:mkItems(['EQ-002',1]), BorrowDate:d(-20), DueDate:d(-13), ReturnDate:'', Note:'', Status:'ยกเลิก'}
  ];
  /* คำนวณจำนวนคงเหลือใหม่ตามรายการที่ยังไม่คืน/ยังไม่ยกเลิก เพื่อความถูกต้องเสมอ */
  equipmentList.forEach(e=> e.AvailableQty = e.TotalQty);
  borrowsList.filter(b=> b.Status!=='คืนแล้ว' && b.Status!=='ยกเลิก').forEach(b=>{
    b.Items.forEach(it=>{
      const eq = equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===it.EquipmentID);
      if(eq) eq.AvailableQty -= Number(it.Qty);
    });
  });
}

/* ---------- API ---------- */
async function apiGetEquipment(){
  if(DEMO_MODE) return equipmentList;
  try{
    const res = await fetch(SCRIPT_URL + '?action=equipment');
    const json = await res.json();
    if(json.success) return json.data;
    throw new Error(json.message);
  }catch(err){
    console.error(err);
    setConnBanner(false, 'เชื่อมต่อ Google Sheet ไม่สำเร็จ — แสดงข้อมูลตัวอย่างแทน');
    DEMO_MODE = true;
    buildDemoData();
    return equipmentList;
  }
}
async function apiGetBorrows(){
  if(DEMO_MODE) return borrowsList;
  try{
    const res = await fetch(SCRIPT_URL + '?action=list');
    const json = await res.json();
    if(json.success) return json.data;
    throw new Error(json.message);
  }catch(err){
    console.error(err);
    setConnBanner(false, 'เชื่อมต่อ Google Sheet ไม่สำเร็จ — แสดงข้อมูลตัวอย่างแทน');
    DEMO_MODE = true;
    buildDemoData();
    return borrowsList;
  }
}
async function apiBorrow(payload){
  if(DEMO_MODE){
    for(const it of payload.items){
      const eq = equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===it.equipmentId);
      if(!eq) return {success:false, message:'ไม่พบอุปกรณ์บางรายการ'};
      if(it.qty > eq.AvailableQty) return {success:false, message:`อุปกรณ์ ${eq.Name} เหลือไม่พอ (คงเหลือ ${eq.AvailableQty} รายการ)`};
    }
    payload.items.forEach(it=>{ const eq=equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===it.equipmentId); eq.AvailableQty -= it.qty; });
    const items = payload.items.map(it=>{ const eq=equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===it.equipmentId); return {EquipmentID:it.equipmentId, EquipmentName:eq.Name, Qty:it.qty}; });
    borrowsList.unshift({
      BorrowID:'BRW'+Date.now(), BorrowerName:payload.borrowerName, StudentID:payload.studentId, Phone:payload.phone,
      Items:items, BorrowDate:payload.borrowDate, DueDate:payload.dueDate, ReturnDate:'', Note:payload.note||'',
      Status: payload.immediateApprove ? 'กำลังยืม' : 'รอการอนุมัติ'
    });
    return {success:true};
  }
  const res = await fetch(SCRIPT_URL, {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'text/plain;charset=utf-8'}, body:JSON.stringify({action:'borrow', payload})});
  return res.json();
}
async function apiReturn(id){
  if(DEMO_MODE){
    const b = borrowsList.find(x=>x.BorrowID===id);
    if(!b) return {success:false, message:'ไม่พบรายการยืมนี้'};
    if(b.Status==='คืนแล้ว' || b.Status==='ยกเลิก') return {success:false, message:'รายการนี้ไม่สามารถรับคืนได้'};
    b.Status = 'คืนแล้ว'; b.ReturnDate = fmtDate(new Date());
    (b.Items||[]).forEach(it=>{ const eq=equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===it.EquipmentID); if(eq) eq.AvailableQty += Number(it.Qty); });
    return {success:true};
  }
  const res = await fetch(SCRIPT_URL, {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'text/plain;charset=utf-8'}, body:JSON.stringify({action:'return', payload:{id, returnDate:fmtDate(new Date())}})});
  return res.json();
}
async function apiApproveBooking(id){
  if(DEMO_MODE){
    const b = borrowsList.find(x=>x.BorrowID===id);
    if(!b) return {success:false, message:'ไม่พบรายการ'};
    if(b.Status !== 'รอการอนุมัติ') return {success:false, message:'รายการนี้ไม่ได้อยู่ในสถานะรอการอนุมัติ'};
    b.Status = 'กำลังยืม';
    return {success:true};
  }
  const res = await fetch(SCRIPT_URL, {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'text/plain;charset=utf-8'}, body:JSON.stringify({action:'approveBooking', payload:{id, passcode:adminPasscode}})});
  return res.json();
}
async function apiCancelBooking(id){
  if(DEMO_MODE){
    const b = borrowsList.find(x=>x.BorrowID===id);
    if(!b) return {success:false, message:'ไม่พบรายการ'};
    if(b.Status==='คืนแล้ว' || b.Status==='ยกเลิก') return {success:false, message:'ไม่สามารถยกเลิกรายการนี้ได้'};
    (b.Items||[]).forEach(it=>{ const eq=equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===it.EquipmentID); if(eq) eq.AvailableQty += Number(it.Qty); });
    b.Status = 'ยกเลิก';
    return {success:true};
  }
  const res = await fetch(SCRIPT_URL, {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'text/plain;charset=utf-8'}, body:JSON.stringify({action:'cancelBooking', payload:{id, passcode:adminPasscode}})});
  return res.json();
}
async function apiEditBooking(id, payload){
  if(DEMO_MODE){
    const b = borrowsList.find(x=>x.BorrowID===id);
    if(!b) return {success:false, message:'ไม่พบรายการ'};
    if(b.Status==='คืนแล้ว' || b.Status==='ยกเลิก') return {success:false, message:'ไม่สามารถแก้ไขรายการนี้ได้'};
    /* คืนจำนวนเดิมกลับเข้าสต๊อกชั่วคราวเพื่อคำนวณใหม่ */
    (b.Items||[]).forEach(it=>{ const eq=equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===it.EquipmentID); if(eq) eq.AvailableQty += Number(it.Qty); });
    for(const it of payload.items){
      const eq = equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===it.equipmentId);
      if(!eq || it.qty > eq.AvailableQty){
        /* ย้อนกลับ: หักจำนวนเดิมออกอีกครั้งเพื่อคงสภาพเดิมไว้ */
        (b.Items||[]).forEach(it2=>{ const eq2=equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===it2.EquipmentID); if(eq2) eq2.AvailableQty -= Number(it2.Qty); });
        return {success:false, message:`อุปกรณ์ไม่พอสำหรับ ${eq ? eq.Name : it.equipmentId}`};
      }
    }
    payload.items.forEach(it=>{ const eq=equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===it.equipmentId); eq.AvailableQty -= Number(it.qty); });
    b.BorrowerName = payload.borrowerName; b.StudentID = payload.studentId; b.Phone = payload.phone;
    b.BorrowDate = payload.borrowDate; b.DueDate = payload.dueDate; b.Note = payload.note || '';
    b.Items = payload.items.map(it=>{ const eq=equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===it.equipmentId); return {EquipmentID:it.equipmentId, EquipmentName:eq?eq.Name:it.equipmentId, Qty:it.qty}; });
    return {success:true};
  }
  const res = await fetch(SCRIPT_URL, {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'text/plain;charset=utf-8'}, body:JSON.stringify({action:'editBooking', payload:{id, ...payload, passcode:adminPasscode}})});
  return res.json();
}
async function apiCheckPasscode(passcode){
  if(DEMO_MODE) return {success: passcode===DEMO_ADMIN_PASSCODE, message:'รหัสผ่านไม่ถูกต้อง'};
  const res = await fetch(SCRIPT_URL, {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'text/plain;charset=utf-8'}, body:JSON.stringify({action:'checkPasscode', payload:{passcode}})});
  return res.json();
}
async function apiAddEquipment(payload){
  if(DEMO_MODE){
    const id = 'EQ-'+String(equipmentList.length+1).padStart(3,'0');
    equipmentList.push({EquipmentID:id, Name:payload.name, Category:payload.category, TotalQty:payload.qty, AvailableQty:payload.qty, ImageURL:payload.image||''});
    return {success:true, id};
  }
  const res = await fetch(SCRIPT_URL, {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'text/plain;charset=utf-8'}, body:JSON.stringify({action:'addEquipment', payload:{...payload, passcode:adminPasscode}})});
  return res.json();
}

function setConnBanner(ok, msg){
  const el = document.getElementById('connBanner');
  document.getElementById('connText').textContent = msg;
  el.classList.toggle('ok', ok); el.classList.toggle('demo', !ok);
}
function showToast(msg, ok=true){
  const t = document.getElementById('toast');
  document.getElementById('toastText').textContent = msg;
  t.style.background = ok ? '#0f9d58' : '#dc2626';
  t.classList.add('show');
  setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'), 3200);
}

/* ---------- Derived helpers ---------- */
function statusInfo(b){
  if(b.Status === 'คืนแล้ว') return {label:'คืนแล้ว', cls:'returned'};
  if(b.Status === 'ยกเลิก') return {label:'ยกเลิก', cls:'cancelled'};
  if(b.Status === 'รอการอนุมัติ') return {label:'รออนุมัติ', cls:'pending'};
  const days = daysBetween(fmtDate(today), b.DueDate);
  if(days < 0) return {label:'เกินกำหนด', cls:'overdue'};
  if(days === 0) return {label:'วันนี้', cls:'overdue'};
  if(days === 1) return {label:'พรุ่งนี้', cls:'due-soon'};
  if(days <= 3) return {label:`อีก ${days} วัน`, cls:'due-soon'};
  return {label:'กำลังยืม', cls:'borrowing'};
}
function itemsSummary(b){
  if(!b.Items || !b.Items.length) return '-';
  return b.Items.map(it=>`${it.EquipmentName} × ${it.Qty}`).join(', ');
}

/* ---------- Equipment thumbnail rendering ---------- */
function equipThumbHtml(e){
  const letter = esc((e.Name||'?').trim().charAt(0) || '?');
  if(e.ImageURL){
    return `<div class="eq-thumb"><img src="${escAttr(e.ImageURL)}" alt="${escAttr(e.Name)}" onerror="this.parentElement.classList.add('eq-thumb-fallback');this.parentElement.innerHTML='${letter}';"></div>`;
  }
  return `<div class="eq-thumb eq-thumb-fallback">${letter}</div>`;
}

/* ---------- Item picker (multi-select equipment component) ---------- */
function ipAvailable(eq, prefix){
  let avail = Number(eq.AvailableQty);
  if(prefix==='edit') avail += Number(editOriginalItems[eq.EquipmentID]||0);
  return avail;
}
function ipSelectedQty(prefix, eqId){
  const it = pickerStates[prefix].items.find(x=>x.equipmentId===eqId);
  return it ? it.qty : 0;
}
function renderIPGrid(prefix){
  const grid = document.getElementById(prefix+'_ipGrid');
  if(!grid) return;
  const searchInput = document.querySelector(`.ip-search[data-prefix="${prefix}"]`);
  const q = (searchInput?.value||'').toLowerCase();
  const filtered = equipmentList.filter(e=> !q || (e.Name||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) || (e.Category||'').toLowerCase().includes(q));
  grid.innerHTML = filtered.map(e=>{
    const avail = ipAvailable(e, prefix);
    const sel = ipSelectedQty(prefix, e.EquipmentID);
    const disabled = avail<=0;
    return `<div class="ip-card ${disabled && sel<=0 ?'ip-disabled':''}">
      ${equipThumbHtml(e)}
      <div class="ip-card-name">${esc(e.Name)}</div>
      <div class="ip-card-avail">คงเหลือ ${avail}</div>
      ${sel>0
        ? `<div class="ip-stepper">
             <button type="button" onclick="ipChangeQty('${prefix}','${e.EquipmentID}',-1)">−</button>
             <span>${sel}</span>
             <button type="button" onclick="ipChangeQty('${prefix}','${e.EquipmentID}',1)" ${sel>=avail?'disabled':''}>+</button>
           </div>`
        : `<button type="button" class="ip-add-btn" ${disabled?'disabled':''} onclick="ipAddItem('${prefix}','${e.EquipmentID}')">+ เพิ่ม</button>`
      }
    </div>`;
  }).join('') || `<p class="ip-empty">ไม่พบอุปกรณ์ที่ค้นหา</p>`;
}
function renderIPSelected(prefix){
  const box = document.getElementById(prefix+'_ipSelected');
  if(!box) return;
  const state = pickerStates[prefix];
  if(!state.items.length){ box.innerHTML = `<p class="ip-empty">ยังไม่ได้เลือกอุปกรณ์</p>`; return; }
  box.innerHTML = state.items.map(it=>{
    const eq = equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===it.equipmentId);
    return `<div class="ip-selected-row">
      <div class="ip-selected-info"><b>${esc(eq?eq.Name:it.equipmentId)}</b><span>จำนวน ${it.qty}</span></div>
      <button type="button" class="ip-remove-btn" onclick="ipRemoveItem('${prefix}','${it.equipmentId}')">ลบ</button>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}
function ipAddItem(prefix, eqId){
  const eq = equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===eqId);
  if(!eq) return;
  const avail = ipAvailable(eq, prefix);
  if(avail<=0) return;
  const state = pickerStates[prefix];
  const existing = state.items.find(x=>x.equipmentId===eqId);
  if(existing){ if(existing.qty<avail) existing.qty++; } else { state.items.push({equipmentId:eqId, qty:1}); }
  renderIPGrid(prefix); renderIPSelected(prefix);
}
function ipChangeQty(prefix, eqId, delta){
  const state = pickerStates[prefix];
  const it = state.items.find(x=>x.equipmentId===eqId);
  if(!it) return;
  const eq = equipmentList.find(e=>e.EquipmentID===eqId);
  const avail = eq ? ipAvailable(eq, prefix) : 999;
  it.qty += delta;
  if(it.qty<=0){ state.items = state.items.filter(x=>x.equipmentId!==eqId); }
  else if(it.qty>avail){ it.qty = avail; }
  renderIPGrid(prefix); renderIPSelected(prefix);
}
function ipRemoveItem(prefix, eqId){
  const state = pickerStates[prefix];
  state.items = state.items.filter(x=>x.equipmentId!==eqId);
  renderIPGrid(prefix); renderIPSelected(prefix);
}
function ipReset(prefix){
  pickerStates[prefix] = {items:[]};
  if(prefix==='edit') editOriginalItems = {};
  const s = document.querySelector(`.ip-search[data-prefix="${prefix}"]`);
  if(s) s.value = '';
  renderIPGrid(prefix); renderIPSelected(prefix);
}
document.querySelectorAll('.ip-search').forEach(inp=>{
  inp.addEventListener('input', ()=> renderIPGrid(inp.dataset.prefix));
});

/* ---------- Admin gate ---------- */
function requireAdminOrPrompt(){
  if(!adminPasscode){
    showToast('กรุณาเข้าสู่ระบบเจ้าหน้าที่ที่เมนู "ตั้งค่า" ก่อนทำรายการนี้', false);
    goToView('settings');
    return false;
  }
  return true;
}

/* ---------- Navigation ---------- */
const pageTitles = {
  home:'หน้าหลัก', borrow:'ยืมอุปกรณ์', return:'คืนอุปกรณ์', approvals:'อนุมัติการจอง', allBorrows:'รายการยืมทั้งหมด',
  equipment:'อุปกรณ์ทั้งหมด', users:'ผู้ใช้งาน', reports:'รายงาน', dueAlerts:'แจ้งเตือนวันคืน', settings:'ตั้งค่า'
};
function goToView(name){
  if(name === 'logout'){
    showToast('ออกจากระบบแล้ว (จำลอง)');
    return;
  }
  document.querySelectorAll('.sb-nav button').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.view===name));
  document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(v=>v.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('view-'+name).classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('pageTitle').textContent = pageTitles[name] || '';
  document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.remove('open');
  if(name==='allBorrows') renderAllBorrows();
  if(name==='equipment') renderEquipment();
  if(name==='users') renderUsers();
  if(name==='reports') renderReports();
  if(name==='dueAlerts') renderDueAlertsFull();
  if(name==='approvals') renderApprovals();
  window.scrollTo({top:0, behavior:'smooth'});
}
document.querySelectorAll('[data-view]').forEach(el=>{
  el.addEventListener('click', ()=> goToView(el.dataset.view));
});
document.getElementById('hamburgerBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
  document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('open');
});
document.getElementById('bellBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=> goToView('dueAlerts'));

/* ---------- Rendering: dashboard ---------- */
function renderDashboard(){
  const totalQty = equipmentList.reduce((s,e)=>s+Number(e.TotalQty),0);
  const activeBorrows = borrowsList.filter(b=>b.Status==='กำลังยืม');
  const pendingBorrows = borrowsList.filter(b=>b.Status==='รอการอนุมัติ');
  const borrowingQty = activeBorrows.reduce((s,b)=>s+(b.Items||[]).reduce((s2,it)=>s2+Number(it.Qty),0),0);
  const dueSoon = activeBorrows.filter(b=>{ const d=daysBetween(fmtDate(today), b.DueDate); return d>=0 && d<=3; });
  const overdue = activeBorrows.filter(b=> daysBetween(fmtDate(today), b.DueDate) < 0);

  document.getElementById('statTotal').innerHTML = `${totalQty} <span>รายการ</span>`;
  document.getElementById('statBorrowing').innerHTML = `${activeBorrows.length} <span>รายการ</span>`;
  document.getElementById('statBorrowingPct').textContent = totalQty ? `คิดเป็น ${Math.round(borrowingQty/totalQty*100)}%` : '';
  document.getElementById('statPending').innerHTML = `${pendingBorrows.length} <span>รายการ</span>`;
  document.getElementById('statDueSoon').innerHTML = `${dueSoon.length} <span>รายการ</span>`;
  document.getElementById('statOverdue').innerHTML = `${overdue.length} <span>รายการ</span>`;
  document.getElementById('overdueDot').style.display = overdue.length ? 'block' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('bellBadge').textContent = dueSoon.length + overdue.length;

  const recent = borrowsList.slice().sort((a,b)=> new Date(b.BorrowDate) - new Date(a.BorrowDate)).slice(0,5);
  document.getElementById('recentBorrowsBody').innerHTML = recent.map(b=>{
    const s = statusInfo(b);
    return `<tr>
      <td>${esc(b.BorrowID)}</td>
      <td><div class="who-cell"><div class="who-avatar">${esc(shortName(b.BorrowerName))}</div>
        <div><div class="who-name">${esc(b.BorrowerName)}</div><div class="who-sub">${esc(b.StudentID||'')}</div></div></div></td>
      <td>${esc(itemsSummary(b))}</td>
      <td>${b.BorrowDate}</td>
      <td>${b.DueDate}</td>
      <td><span class="badge ${s.cls}">${s.label}</span></td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('') || `<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--muted);padding:20px;">ยังไม่มีรายการยืม</td></tr>`;

  const reminders = activeBorrows
    .map(b=>({b, days: daysBetween(fmtDate(today), b.DueDate)}))
    .filter(x=> x.days <= 3)
    .sort((a,c)=> a.days - c.days)
    .slice(0,3);
  document.getElementById('reminderList').innerHTML = reminders.map(({b,days})=>{
    const label = days < 0 ? `เกินกำหนด ${Math.abs(days)} วัน` : days===0 ? 'วันนี้' : days===1 ? 'พรุ่งนี้' : `อีก ${days} วัน`;
    const cls = days <= 0 ? 'today' : '';
    return `<div class="reminder-item">
      <div class="reminder-icon ${cls}"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 7v5l3 3"/></svg></div>
      <div><div class="reminder-title">${esc(itemsSummary(b))}</div>
      <div class="reminder-sub">โดย ${esc(b.BorrowerName)} · ครบกำหนด ${b.DueDate}</div></div>
      <span class="badge ${days<=0?'overdue':'due-soon'}" style="margin-right:auto;">${label}</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('') || `<div class="placeholder" style="padding:24px 10px;"><p>ไม่มีรายการใกล้ถึงกำหนดคืน</p></div>`;

  renderApprovals();
}

/* ---------- Rendering: approvals ---------- */
function updateApprovalsBadge(n){
  const el = document.getElementById('approvalsNavBadge');
  if(!el) return;
  el.textContent = n;
  el.style.display = n>0 ? 'flex' : 'none';
}
function renderApprovals(){
  const box = document.getElementById('approvalsBody');
  const pending = borrowsList.filter(b=>b.Status==='รอการอนุมัติ').sort((a,b)=> new Date(a.BorrowDate)-new Date(b.BorrowDate));
  updateApprovalsBadge(pending.length);
  if(!box) return;
  if(!pending.length){
    box.innerHTML = `<div class="placeholder"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg><h3>ไม่มีรายการรอการอนุมัติ</h3><p>คำขอจองใหม่จะปรากฏที่นี่</p></div>`;
    return;
  }
  box.innerHTML = `<div style="overflow-x:auto;"><table class="data-table">
    <thead><tr><th>รหัส</th><th>ผู้ยืม</th><th>รายการอุปกรณ์</th><th>วันที่ยืม</th><th>กำหนดคืน</th><th>หมายเหตุ</th><th>จัดการ</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>${pending.map(b=>`<tr>
      <td>${esc(b.BorrowID)}</td>
      <td><div class="who-name">${esc(b.BorrowerName)}</div><div class="who-sub">${esc(b.StudentID||'')} · ${esc(b.Phone||'')}</div></td>
      <td>${esc(itemsSummary(b))}</td>
      <td>${b.BorrowDate}</td><td>${b.DueDate}</td>
      <td>${esc(b.Note||'—')}</td>
      <td><div class="action-btns">
        <button class="btn-primary btn-xs" onclick="approveBookingClick('${b.BorrowID}')">✓ อนุมัติ</button>
        <button class="btn-secondary btn-xs" onclick="openEditModal('${b.BorrowID}')">แก้ไข</button>
        <button class="btn-secondary btn-xs" style="color:var(--red-600);" onclick="cancelBookingClick('${b.BorrowID}')">ยกเลิก</button>
      </div></td>
    </tr>`).join('')}</tbody></table></div>`;
}
async function approveBookingClick(id){
  if(!requireAdminOrPrompt()) return;
  try{
    const result = await apiApproveBooking(id);
    if(result.success){
      await refreshAll();
      showToast('อนุมัติการจองสำเร็จ');
      if(document.getElementById('view-allBorrows').classList.contains('active')) renderAllBorrows();
    }else{
      showToast(result.message||'อนุมัติไม่สำเร็จ', false);
    }
  }catch(err){ console.error(err); showToast('เกิดข้อผิดพลาดในการเชื่อมต่อ', false); }
}
async function cancelBookingClick(id){
  if(!requireAdminOrPrompt()) return;
  if(!confirm('ยืนยันการยกเลิกรายการจองนี้?')) return;
  try{
    const result = await apiCancelBooking(id);
    if(result.success){
      await refreshAll();
      showToast('ยกเลิกรายการสำเร็จ');
      if(document.getElementById('view-allBorrows').classList.contains('active')) renderAllBorrows();
      if(document.getElementById('view-return').classList.contains('active') && document.getElementById('returnSearchInput').value) document.getElementById('returnSearchBtn').click();
    }else{
      showToast(result.message||'ยกเลิกไม่สำเร็จ', false);
    }
  }catch(err){ console.error(err); showToast('เกิดข้อผิดพลาดในการเชื่อมต่อ', false); }
}

/* ---------- Rendering: all borrows ---------- */
function bookingActionsHtml(b){
  const btns = [];
  if(b.Status==='รอการอนุมัติ'){
    btns.push(`<button class="btn-primary btn-xs" onclick="approveBookingClick('${b.BorrowID}')">อนุมัติ</button>`);
  }
  if(b.Status==='รอการอนุมัติ' || b.Status==='กำลังยืม'){
    btns.push(`<button class="btn-secondary btn-xs" onclick="openEditModal('${b.BorrowID}')">แก้ไข</button>`);
    btns.push(`<button class="btn-secondary btn-xs" style="color:var(--red-600);" onclick="cancelBookingClick('${b.BorrowID}')">ยกเลิก</button>`);
  }
  return btns.length ? `<div class="action-btns">${btns.join('')}</div>` : '—';
}
function renderAllBorrows(){
  const q = (document.getElementById('allSearchInput').value || '').toLowerCase();
  const statusFilter = document.getElementById('allStatusFilter').value;
  const filtered = borrowsList.filter(b=>{
    const matchQ = !q || (b.BorrowerName||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) || (b.StudentID||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) || itemsSummary(b).toLowerCase().includes(q) || (b.BorrowID||'').toLowerCase().includes(q);
    const matchStatus = !statusFilter || b.Status === statusFilter;
    return matchQ && matchStatus;
  }).sort((a,b)=> new Date(b.BorrowDate) - new Date(a.BorrowDate));

  document.getElementById('allBorrowsBody').innerHTML = filtered.map(b=>{
    const s = statusInfo(b);
    return `<tr>
      <td>${esc(b.BorrowID)}</td>
      <td><div class="who-cell"><div class="who-avatar">${esc(shortName(b.BorrowerName))}</div>
        <div><div class="who-name">${esc(b.BorrowerName)}</div><div class="who-sub">${esc(b.StudentID||'')}</div></div></div></td>
      <td>${esc(itemsSummary(b))}</td>
      <td>${b.BorrowDate}</td>
      <td>${b.DueDate}</td>
      <td>${b.ReturnDate||'—'}</td>
      <td><span class="badge ${s.cls}">${s.label}</span></td>
      <td>${bookingActionsHtml(b)}</td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('') || `<tr><td colspan="8" style="text-align:center;color:var(--muted);padding:20px;">ไม่พบรายการ</td></tr>`;
}
document.getElementById('allFilterBtn').addEventListener('click', renderAllBorrows);
document.getElementById('allSearchInput').addEventListener('keydown', e=>{ if(e.key==='Enter') renderAllBorrows(); });

/* ---------- Rendering: equipment ---------- */
function renderEquipment(){
  const q = (document.getElementById('equipSearchInput').value || '').toLowerCase();
  const filtered = equipmentList.filter(e=> !q || (e.Name||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) || (e.Category||'').toLowerCase().includes(q));
  document.getElementById('equipGrid').innerHTML = filtered.map(e=>{
    const pct = e.TotalQty ? Math.round(e.AvailableQty/e.TotalQty*100) : 0;
    return `<div class="equip-card">
      ${equipThumbHtml(e)}
      <div class="equip-name">${esc(e.Name)}</div>
      <div class="equip-cat">${esc(e.Category)}</div>
      <div class="equip-qty"><span>คงเหลือ ${e.AvailableQty}</span><span>ทั้งหมด ${e.TotalQty}</span></div>
      <div class="equip-bar"><div class="equip-bar-fill" style="width:${pct}%;"></div></div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('') || `<div class="placeholder"><p>ไม่พบอุปกรณ์</p></div>`;
}
document.getElementById('equipSearchInput').addEventListener('input', renderEquipment);

/* ---------- Rendering: users ---------- */
function renderUsers(){
  const map = {};
  borrowsList.forEach(b=>{
    if(b.Status==='ยกเลิก') return;
    const key = (b.StudentID||'') + '|' + (b.BorrowerName||'');
    if(!map[key]) map[key] = {name:b.BorrowerName, studentId:b.StudentID, phone:b.Phone, count:0, active:0};
    map[key].count++;
    if(b.Status === 'กำลังยืม') map[key].active++;
  });
  const rows = Object.values(map).sort((a,b)=> b.count - a.count);
  document.getElementById('usersBody').innerHTML = rows.map(u=>`<tr>
    <td><div class="who-cell"><div class="who-avatar">${esc(shortName(u.name))}</div><div class="who-name">${esc(u.name)}</div></div></td>
    <td>${esc(u.studentId||'—')}</td><td>${esc(u.phone||'—')}</td><td>${u.count}</td>
    <td>${u.active ? `<span class="badge borrowing">${u.active} รายการ</span>` : '—'}</td>
  </tr>`).join('') || `<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align:center;color:var(--muted);padding:20px;">ยังไม่มีข้อมูลผู้ใช้งาน</td></tr>`;
}

/* ---------- Rendering: reports ---------- */
function renderReports(){
  const totalQty = equipmentList.reduce((s,e)=>s+Number(e.TotalQty),0);
  const activeBorrows = borrowsList.filter(b=>b.Status==='กำลังยืม');
  const pendingBorrows = borrowsList.filter(b=>b.Status==='รอการอนุมัติ');
  const returned = borrowsList.filter(b=>b.Status==='คืนแล้ว');
  const overdue = activeBorrows.filter(b=> daysBetween(fmtDate(today), b.DueDate) < 0);

  document.getElementById('reportStatGrid').innerHTML = `
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon green"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M9 2h6M10 2v5.5L4.5 18a2 2 0 0 0 1.8 2.9h11.4a2 2 0 0 0 1.8-2.9L14 7.5V2"/></svg></div>
      <div><div class="stat-label">อุปกรณ์ทั้งหมด</div><div class="stat-value">${totalQty} <span>รายการ</span></div></div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon blue"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2"/></svg></div>
      <div><div class="stat-label">การยืมทั้งหมด (สะสม)</div><div class="stat-value">${borrowsList.length} <span>ครั้ง</span></div></div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon purple"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 12l2 2 4-4M12 3l7 4v5c0 5-3.5 7.5-7 9-3.5-1.5-7-4-7-9V7l7-4z"/></svg></div>
      <div><div class="stat-label">รอการอนุมัติ</div><div class="stat-value">${pendingBorrows.length} <span>รายการ</span></div></div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon green"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg></div>
      <div><div class="stat-label">คืนแล้ว</div><div class="stat-value">${returned.length} <span>ครั้ง</span></div></div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon red"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/></svg></div>
      <div><div class="stat-label">เกินกำหนดคืน</div><div class="stat-value">${overdue.length} <span>รายการ</span></div></div></div>
  `;

  const counts = {};
  borrowsList.forEach(b=>{ (b.Items||[]).forEach(it=>{ counts[it.EquipmentName] = (counts[it.EquipmentName]||0) + Number(it.Qty); }); });
  const top = Object.entries(counts).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,6);
  const max = top.length ? top[0][1] : 1;
  document.getElementById('reportTopEquipment').innerHTML = top.map(([name,count])=>`
    <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:5px;"><span>${esc(name)}</span><span style="font-weight:700;">${count} ครั้ง</span></div>
      <div class="equip-bar"><div class="equip-bar-fill" style="width:${Math.round(count/max*100)}%;"></div></div>
    </div>
  `).join('') || `<p style="color:var(--muted);">ยังไม่มีข้อมูลการยืม</p>`;
}

/* ---------- Rendering: due alerts full ---------- */
function renderDueAlertsFull(){
  const activeBorrows = borrowsList.filter(b=>b.Status==='กำลังยืม')
    .map(b=>({b, days: daysBetween(fmtDate(today), b.DueDate)}))
    .sort((a,c)=> a.days - c.days);
  document.getElementById('dueAlertsFull').innerHTML = activeBorrows.map(({b,days})=>{
    const label = days < 0 ? `เกินกำหนด ${Math.abs(days)} วัน` : days===0 ? 'วันนี้' : days===1 ? 'พรุ่งนี้' : `อีก ${days} วัน`;
    const cls = days <= 0 ? 'today' : '';
    return `<div class="reminder-item">
      <div class="reminder-icon ${cls}"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 7v5l3 3"/></svg></div>
      <div><div class="reminder-title">${esc(itemsSummary(b))} <span style="color:var(--muted);font-weight:500;">(${esc(b.BorrowID)})</span></div>
      <div class="reminder-sub">โดย ${esc(b.BorrowerName)} · ${esc(b.StudentID||'')} · ครบกำหนด ${b.DueDate}</div></div>
      <span class="badge ${days<=0?'overdue':'due-soon'}" style="margin-right:auto;">${label}</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('') || `<div class="placeholder"><p>ไม่มีรายการที่ต้องแจ้งเตือน</p></div>`;
}

/* ---------- Borrow form (multi-item) ---------- */
const bBorrowDate = document.getElementById('b_borrowDate');
const bDueDate = document.getElementById('b_dueDate');
bBorrowDate.value = fmtDate(today);
(function(){ const d=new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate()+7); bDueDate.value = fmtDate(d); })();

function showFieldError(input){ input.classList.add('err'); const err=input.closest('.field').querySelector('.err-msg'); if(err) err.classList.add('show'); }
function clearFieldError(input){ input.classList.remove('err'); const err=input.closest('.field').querySelector('.err-msg'); if(err) err.classList.remove('show'); }
document.querySelectorAll('#borrowForm input, #borrowForm select').forEach(el=>{
  el.addEventListener('input', ()=>clearFieldError(el));
  el.addEventListener('change', ()=>clearFieldError(el));
});

document.getElementById('borrowForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  const name = document.getElementById('b_name');
  const studentId = document.getElementById('b_studentId');
  const phone = document.getElementById('b_phone');
  const note = document.getElementById('b_note');
  [name, studentId, phone].forEach(clearFieldError);
  document.getElementById('bform_ipErr').classList.remove('show');

  let valid = true;
  if(!name.value.trim()){ showFieldError(name); valid=false; }
  if(!studentId.value.trim()){ showFieldError(studentId); valid=false; }
  const phoneClean = phone.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g,'');
  if(!phoneClean || phoneClean.length < 9){ showFieldError(phone); valid=false; }
  if(bDueDate.value <= bBorrowDate.value){ showFieldError(bDueDate); valid=false; } else { clearFieldError(bDueDate); }
  const items = pickerStates.bform.items;
