  if(!items.length){ document.getElementById('bform_ipErr').classList.add('show'); valid=false; }

  if(!valid){ showToast('กรุณากรอกข้อมูลให้ครบถ้วนและถูกต้อง', false); return; }

  const immediateApprove = document.getElementById('b_immediateApprove').checked;
  const btn = document.getElementById('borrowSubmitBtn');
  btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'กำลังบันทึก...';
  try{
    const result = await apiBorrow({
      borrowerName:name.value.trim(), studentId:studentId.value.trim(), phone:phone.value.trim(),
      items: items.map(it=>({equipmentId:it.equipmentId, qty:it.qty})),
      borrowDate:bBorrowDate.value, dueDate:bDueDate.value, note:note.value.trim(),
      immediateApprove
    });
    if(result.success){
      await refreshAll();
      showToast(immediateApprove ? 'บันทึกการยืมสำเร็จ' : 'ส่งคำขอจองสำเร็จ รอการอนุมัติจากเจ้าหน้าที่');
      this.reset();
      document.getElementById('b_immediateApprove').checked = true;
      bBorrowDate.value = fmtDate(today);
      const d=new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate()+7); bDueDate.value = fmtDate(d);
      ipReset('bform');
    }else{
      showToast(result.message || 'บันทึกไม่สำเร็จ', false);
    }
  }catch(err){
    console.error(err);
    showToast('เกิดข้อผิดพลาดในการเชื่อมต่อ', false);
  }finally{
    btn.disabled = false;
    btn.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="16" height="16"><path stroke-linecap="round" d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg> บันทึกการยืม';
  }
});
document.getElementById('borrowResetBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
  document.getElementById('borrowForm').reset();
  document.querySelectorAll('#borrowForm .err').forEach(clearFieldError);
  document.getElementById('bform_ipErr').classList.remove('show');
  bBorrowDate.value = fmtDate(today);
  const d=new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate()+7); bDueDate.value = fmtDate(d);
  ipReset('bform');
});

/* ---------- Return form ---------- */
function renderReturnResults(list){
  const body = document.getElementById('returnBody');
  const active = list.filter(b=>b.Status === 'กำลังยืม');
  if(!active.length){
    body.innerHTML = `<div class="placeholder"><h3>ไม่พบรายการที่ยังไม่คืน</h3><p>ลองตรวจสอบรหัสการยืมหรือชื่อผู้ยืมอีกครั้ง (รายการที่รอการอนุมัติจะยังไม่แสดงในหน้านี้)</p></div>`;
    return;
  }
  body.innerHTML = `<div style="overflow-x:auto;"><table class="data-table">
    <thead><tr><th>รหัสการยืม</th><th>ผู้ยืม</th><th>รายการอุปกรณ์</th><th>กำหนดคืน</th><th>สถานะ</th><th>จัดการ</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>${active.map(b=>{
      const s = statusInfo(b);
      return `<tr>
        <td>${esc(b.BorrowID)}</td>
        <td><div class="who-name">${esc(b.BorrowerName)}</div><div class="who-sub">${esc(b.StudentID||'')}</div></td>
        <td>${esc(itemsSummary(b))}</td><td>${b.DueDate}</td>
        <td><span class="badge ${s.cls}">${s.label}</span></td>
        <td><button class="btn-primary btn-xs" onclick="doReturn('${b.BorrowID}')">✓ รับคืนทั้งหมด</button></td>
      </tr>`;
    }).join('')}</tbody></table></div>`;
}
document.getElementById('returnSearchBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
  const q = (document.getElementById('returnSearchInput').value||'').toLowerCase();
  const filtered = !q ? borrowsList : borrowsList.filter(b=>
    (b.BorrowID||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) || (b.BorrowerName||'').toLowerCase().includes(q) || (b.StudentID||'').toLowerCase().includes(q));
  renderReturnResults(filtered);
});
document.getElementById('returnSearchInput').addEventListener('keydown', e=>{ if(e.key==='Enter') document.getElementById('returnSearchBtn').click(); });

async function doReturn(id){
  try{
    const result = await apiReturn(id);
    if(result.success){
      await refreshAll();
      showToast('รับคืนอุปกรณ์เรียบร้อยแล้ว');
      document.getElementById('returnSearchBtn').click();
    }else{
      showToast(result.message || 'ดำเนินการไม่สำเร็จ', false);
    }
  }catch(err){
    console.error(err);
    showToast('เกิดข้อผิดพลาดในการเชื่อมต่อ', false);
  }
}

/* ---------- Edit booking modal ---------- */
function openEditModal(id){
  if(!requireAdminOrPrompt()) return;
  const b = borrowsList.find(x=>x.BorrowID===id);
  if(!b) return;
  document.getElementById('edit_id').value = b.BorrowID;
  document.getElementById('edit_name').value = b.BorrowerName || '';
  document.getElementById('edit_studentId').value = b.StudentID || '';
  document.getElementById('edit_phone').value = b.Phone || '';
  document.getElementById('edit_borrowDate').value = b.BorrowDate;
  document.getElementById('edit_dueDate').value = b.DueDate;
  document.getElementById('edit_note').value = b.Note || '';
  editOriginalItems = {};
  (b.Items||[]).forEach(it=>{ editOriginalItems[it.EquipmentID] = (editOriginalItems[it.EquipmentID]||0) + Number(it.Qty); });
  pickerStates.edit = {items:(b.Items||[]).map(it=>({equipmentId:it.EquipmentID, qty:Number(it.Qty)}))};
  document.querySelectorAll('#editBookingForm .err').forEach(clearFieldError);
  document.getElementById('edit_ipErr').classList.remove('show');
  const editSearch = document.querySelector('.ip-search[data-prefix="edit"]');
  if(editSearch) editSearch.value = '';
  renderIPGrid('edit'); renderIPSelected('edit');
  document.getElementById('editModalOverlay').classList.add('show');
}
function closeEditModal(){
  document.getElementById('editModalOverlay').classList.remove('show');
  pickerStates.edit = {items:[]};
  editOriginalItems = {};
}
document.getElementById('editModalCloseBtn').addEventListener('click', closeEditModal);
document.getElementById('editCancelBtn').addEventListener('click', closeEditModal);
document.getElementById('editModalOverlay').addEventListener('click', (e)=>{ if(e.target.id==='editModalOverlay') closeEditModal(); });
document.querySelectorAll('#editBookingForm input').forEach(el=>{
  el.addEventListener('input', ()=>clearFieldError(el));
});
document.getElementById('editBookingForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  const id = document.getElementById('edit_id').value;
  const name = document.getElementById('edit_name');
  const studentId = document.getElementById('edit_studentId');
  const phone = document.getElementById('edit_phone');
  const borrowDate = document.getElementById('edit_borrowDate');
  const dueDate = document.getElementById('edit_dueDate');
  const note = document.getElementById('edit_note');
  [name, studentId, phone].forEach(clearFieldError);
  document.getElementById('edit_ipErr').classList.remove('show');

  let valid = true;
  if(!name.value.trim()){ showFieldError(name); valid=false; }
  if(!studentId.value.trim()){ showFieldError(studentId); valid=false; }
  const phoneClean = phone.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g,'');
  if(!phoneClean || phoneClean.length<9){ showFieldError(phone); valid=false; }
  if(dueDate.value <= borrowDate.value){ showFieldError(dueDate); valid=false; } else { clearFieldError(dueDate); }
  const items = pickerStates.edit.items;
  if(!items.length){ document.getElementById('edit_ipErr').classList.add('show'); valid=false; }

  if(!valid){ showToast('กรุณากรอกข้อมูลให้ครบถ้วนและถูกต้อง', false); return; }

  const btn = document.getElementById('editSubmitBtn');
  btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'กำลังบันทึก...';
  try{
    const result = await apiEditBooking(id, {
      borrowerName:name.value.trim(), studentId:studentId.value.trim(), phone:phone.value.trim(),
      items: items.map(it=>({equipmentId:it.equipmentId, qty:it.qty})),
      borrowDate:borrowDate.value, dueDate:dueDate.value, note:note.value.trim()
    });
    if(result.success){
      await refreshAll();
      showToast('บันทึกการแก้ไขสำเร็จ');
      closeEditModal();
      if(document.getElementById('view-allBorrows').classList.contains('active')) renderAllBorrows();
    }else{
      showToast(result.message || 'บันทึกไม่สำเร็จ', false);
    }
  }catch(err){
    console.error(err);
    showToast('เกิดข้อผิดพลาดในการเชื่อมต่อ', false);
  }finally{
    btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'บันทึกการแก้ไข';
  }
});

/* ---------- Settings / login / add equipment (with image) ---------- */
document.getElementById('settingsLoginBtn').addEventListener('click', async ()=>{
  const input = document.getElementById('settingsPasscodeInput');
  const val = input.value.trim();
  if(!val){ showToast('กรุณากรอกรหัสผ่าน', false); return; }
  const result = await apiCheckPasscode(val);
  if(result.success){
    adminPasscode = val;
    document.getElementById('settingsLoginBox').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('settingsPanel').style.display = 'block';
    input.value = '';
    showToast('เข้าสู่ระบบเจ้าหน้าที่สำเร็จ');
  }else{
    showToast(result.message || 'รหัสผ่านไม่ถูกต้อง', false);
  }
});
document.getElementById('ae_image').addEventListener('input', updateAeImagePreview);
document.getElementById('ae_imageFile').addEventListener('change', function(){
  const file = this.files[0];
  if(!file) return;
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = function(){
    document.getElementById('ae_image').value = reader.result;
    updateAeImagePreview();
  };
  reader.readAsDataURL(file);
});
function updateAeImagePreview(){
  const url = document.getElementById('ae_image').value.trim();
  const box = document.getElementById('ae_imagePreview');
  if(url){
    box.classList.remove('eq-thumb-fallback');
    box.innerHTML = `<img src="${escAttr(url)}" alt="" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:8px;" onerror="this.style.display='none';">`;
  }else{
    box.innerHTML = '';
  }
}
document.getElementById('addEquipForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  const name = document.getElementById('ae_name').value.trim();
  const category = document.getElementById('ae_category').value.trim();
  const qty = Number(document.getElementById('ae_qty').value);
  const image = document.getElementById('ae_image').value.trim();
  if(!name || !category || !qty){ showToast('กรุณากรอกข้อมูลให้ครบถ้วน', false); return; }
  const result = await apiAddEquipment({name, category, qty, image});
  if(result.success){
    await refreshAll();
    showToast('เพิ่มอุปกรณ์สำเร็จ');
    this.reset();
    document.getElementById('ae_imagePreview').innerHTML = '';
  }else{
    showToast(result.message || 'เพิ่มอุปกรณ์ไม่สำเร็จ', false);
  }
});

/* ---------- Initial load ---------- */
async function refreshAll(){
  equipmentList = await apiGetEquipment();
  borrowsList = await apiGetBorrows();
  renderIPGrid('bform'); renderIPSelected('bform');
  renderDashboard();
}
(async function init(){
  document.querySelectorAll('.app-logo-img').forEach(img=>{ img.src = LOGO_DATA_URI; });
  if(DEMO_MODE){
    buildDemoData();
    setConnBanner(false, 'โหมดสาธิต — ยังไม่ได้ตั้งค่า SCRIPT_URL เชื่อมต่อ Google Sheet');
  }else{
    setConnBanner(true, 'กำลังโหลดข้อมูลจาก Google Sheet...');
  }
  await refreshAll();
  if(!DEMO_MODE) setConnBanner(true, 'เชื่อมต่อฐานข้อมูล Google Sheet แล้ว');
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
